summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three critical bug fixes: Trading Signals, Investment Ideas, and Watchlist. All 20 backend tests pass. All three features are now fully functional with populated categories.

fixed.issue: Trading Signals showing all categories as 0
fixed.verification: Trading scan returns Hot(3), Breakout(1), Momentum(2), High Volume(5) - all non-zero

fixed.issue: Investment Ideas showing all categories as 0
fixed.verification: Investment scan returns Hot(15), Bullish(15), Undervalued(15), Watch(15), Bearish(16) - all non-zero. Browse All shows 305 stocks.
Successfully added AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL to watchlist. All persist across page refresh.

issues: Nested button warning: watchlist button is inside card button element - causes HTML validation warning but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Auth access code works correctly
Backend: /api/trading/scan returns data with all categories
Backend: Trading categories are populated (Hot, Breakout, Momentum, High Volume)
Backend: Trading signal structure is valid
Backend: /api/trading/analyze/{symbol} works for AAPL
Backend: /api/investments/browse returns 305 stocks
Backend: /api/investments/scan returns all categories
Backend: Investment categories are populated (Hot, Bullish, Undervalued, Watch, Bearish)
Backend: /api/investments/filters returns filter options
Backend: /api/watchlist GET returns list
Backend: /api/watchlist POST adds AAPL successfully
Backend: /api/watchlist POST adds MSFT successfully
Backend: /api/watchlist POST adds NVDA successfully
Backend: Watchlist items verified after adding
Backend: Watchlist items have price data
Backend: /api/watchlist/check/{symbol} works
Backend: /api/watchlist/{symbol} DELETE works
Backend: Duplicate add returns appropriate message
Backend: /api/prices/batch returns prices
Backend: /api/prices/watchlist returns prices
Frontend: Trading page loads with populated categories
Frontend: Trading page shows Hot(3), Breakout(1), Momentum(2), High Volume(5)
Frontend: Investments page loads with 305 stocks analyzed
Frontend: Investments page shows Hot(15), Bullish(15), Undervalued(15), Watch(15), Bearish(16)
Frontend: Watchlist page loads with existing items
Frontend: Watchlist add ticker (GOOGL) works via UI
Frontend: Watchlist persists across page refresh
Frontend: Live prices indicator shows on all pages
critical_code_review_comments: Trading thresholds were lowered from 70 to 65 for Hot category with dynamic fallback for down markets - working correctly
Investment browse returns 305 stocks with proper categorization
Live prices streaming working on all pages (12s for Trading, 20s for Investments, 15s for Watchlist)
Minor: Nested button HTML warning in Trading.jsx (line 141) - watchlist button inside card button
seed_data_creation: Added AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL to watchlist for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three critical issues are now fixed and verified: 1) Trading Signals shows non-zero counts (Hot:3, Breakout:1, Momentum:2, High Volume:5), 2) Investment Ideas shows 305 stocks with populated categories (Hot:15, Bullish:15, Undervalued:15, Watch:15, Bearish:16), 3) Watchlist add/remove works correctly with persistence. Live prices streaming works on all pages. Minor HTML validation warning for nested buttons in Trading.jsx doesn't affect functionality.

known_issues.nested_button_warning: HTML validation warning for nested button in Trading.jsx - doesn't affect functionality
known_issues.alpaca_401: Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - Portfolio positions empty, but not related to current bug fixes
